sentryflowHost.title: SentryFlow Host
sentryflowHost.description: Hostname or IP address of the SentryFlow server.

sentryflowPath.title: SentryFlow Events Path
sentryflowPath.description: HTTP path where SentryFlow receives Mule events.

sendRequestBody.title: Forward Request Body
sendRequestBody.description: Whether to include the request body in the telemetry payload (may impact performance).

sendResponseBody.title: Forward Response Body
sendResponseBody.description: Whether to include the response body in the telemetry payload (may impact performance).

timeoutMs.title: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for SentryFlow to accept the telemetry POST.
